prompt:
Goal: Create a high-fashion streetwear campaign poster for UNVOID, with a dark cyber-glitch identity and editorial magazine cover styling.

Canvas: Vertical 4:5 poster, realistic photographic base, muted gray concrete architecture background, centered full-body model, sharp white typography overlays, subtle film grain and shallow depth of field.

Main subject: A young female model stands front-facing in the center on a concrete ramp outside a modern brutalist storefront. Her face is obscured by a black horizontal glitch/void mask across the eyes and nose. She has straight black bob-length hair with bangs. Outfit: exactly 4 visible clothing pieces — oversized cropped brown short-sleeve top layered over a black shirt, black mini skirt with white abstract topographic floral line art, black ankle socks, black chunky ankle boots. Pose is neutral and confident, arms relaxed, legs slightly apart.

Background: Modern gray concrete building facade with large dark windows and a storefront entrance. A blurred sign behind the model also reads the brand name, reinforcing the campaign identity. The environment feels urban, minimal, and slightly dystopian.

Typography and layout: Use exactly 8 text elements: 1) enormous white all-caps masthead at the top: UNVOID, spanning nearly the full width, with a tiny registered trademark mark near the upper-right of the word; 2) small text at upper left: SPRING SUMMER 2026; 3) thin horizontal divider line across the upper middle; 4) small text at upper right: COLLECTION 06; 5) small vertical slogan on left side: “IDENTITY IS NOT STATIC — IT GLITCHES.”; 6) small stacked slogan on right side: “WEAR THE ERROR. OWN THE VOID.”; 7) large distressed glitch headline at lower left: ERROR SKIN, with broken horizontal scanline fragments; 8) footer microcopy: lower left “UNVOID® / ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.” and lower right “COLLECTION 06 / SPRING SUMMER 2026” with a small white toggle-switch icon above it.

Visual style: Premium fashion lookbook meets cyberpunk glitch branding. White Helvetica/Grotesk bold typography, high contrast but subdued palette: concrete gray, black, white, muted brown. Add horizontal digital distortion only to the face mask and the lower-left campaign headline. Keep the composition clean, editorial, and campaign-ready.

Constraints: Do not add extra models, props, logos, or additional text. Keep all typography legible and aligned like a luxury streetwear poster. Preserve the model centered under the giant masthead.
